title: Pyromancer: Reignited
description: Combat extended with raging fire and cold steel
body:
# Pyromancer: Reignited

Remake of the original Pyromancer mod for 1.20.1+, bring many unique weapons and tools to enhance combat experience in an unseen way

## Feature summary \[unreliable\]

*   Pyromancies, class of weapons that feed of blaze to cast extraordinary powerful fire attacks.
*   Frost Weapons, class of weapons that freeze all and each, including the user.
*   Maces, a set of weapons that specialize and ruthless assault and breaking though enemies' defenses quickly. ~~I did it in April 2021, check the original mod~~
*   Infusions, consumables that can be applied to weapons to make them trigger different effects on hit.
*   Flaming Grove, a new Nether biome that is covered in fiery vegetation, where creatures born of trees roam and sweet amber drips from atop.
*   Permafrost Caverns, a new underground biome chained in frost and rime, home to unfortunate copper machines animated with malign cold.
*   etc.

## Dependencies

*   Incandescent Lib **\[mandatory\]**
*   Terrablender **\[mandatory\]**
*   Enchantment Descriptions _\[optional\]_

## Wiki

Pending, refer to in-game item description until then.

# Alpha notice

**This mod is in active development, features present in versions before solid release may be added, modified and removed. Some mechanics are unobtainable in survival, or temporarily obtainable in a bootstrapped manner. Purpose of these versions is to test new features and to have fun!**

## Contributing

The repo of this project is open for both issue tracking and contributions, any input is appreciated
